dsl_rule.translation_notes: Belt Hold Candlestick: Entry requires open near/at high AND close below open (bears push down). Exit on close crossing above previous day's high (reversal/recovery signal). Pattern ranks 33/103 in bull markets, 39/103 in bear markets. Exit conditions were author-silent, so a reasonable reversal condition was applied.

backtest_rule.reason: Belt Hold Candlestick: Entry requires open near/at high AND close below open (bears push down). Exit on close crossing above previous day's high (reversal/recovery signal). Pattern ranks 33/103 in bull markets, 39/103 in bear markets. Exit conditions were author-silent, so a reasonable reversal condition was applied.

source_rule_text: Pattern name: Belt Hold Candlestick. Price opens at or near the high for the day, then bears take over and push price down, representing bullish enthusiasm gone wrong.
